name: saga-mcp
display_name: saga-mcp — Governance Platform for Parallel LLM Agents
description: Contract-governed development platform for parallel LLM coding agents. Episode lifecycle with hard gates, CGAD enforcement (18 lint rules), product discovery cycle, 12 role skills, 66 MCP tools.
long_description:
saga-mcp governs parallel LLM coding agents through a contract-driven episode lifecycle: from business hypothesis through architecture (Invariant Registry, Port Registry), requirements (contract-as-data ACs with L3 property tests), parallel development (Pattern B scaffold, semantic conflict detection), independent verification (saga-verifier generates property tests from frozen contracts), to runtime observation and product decision (hit/kill).

**What's new in v2.0:**
- Episode state machine with 7 stages and hard gates
- CGAD enforcement layer: 18 deterministic lint rules
- 4-valued guard verdict (passed/failed/unknown/error, deny-by-default)
- RiskClass = max(declared, derived, policy) — agent cannot self-lower
- Semantic conflict keys + planning-time collision detection
- Runtime observation store (3rd truth axis: Declared / Implemented / Observed)
- Product discovery cycle: hypothesis → metric → observation → hit/kill
- 14 artifact types, 7 trace link types
- Trusted Provider Registry (Deterministic / Authoritative / Authorized)
- 12 skills (architect with Invariant Registry, verifier with L3 property tests, analyst with contract-as-data)
- Complexity Gate: thin / modular / regulated / research
- 66 MCP tools

tools.name: tracker_init
tools.description: Initialize tracker and create first project

tools.name: tracker_dashboard
tools.description: Full project overview with natural language summary

tools.name: project_resolve_by_name
tools.description: Get-or-create project by exact name atomically

tools.name: epic_create
tools.description: Create an epic within a project

tools.name: task_create
tools.description: Create a task with typed fields, risk computation, provenance

tools.name: task_get
tools.description: Get task with subtasks, notes, comments, and dependencies

tools.name: task_update
tools.description: Update task with P15 monotonicity guard and RiskClass recompute

tools.name: comment_add
tools.description: Add a comment to a task

tools.name: comment_list
tools.description: List all comments on a task

tools.name: tracker_session_diff
tools.description: Show what changed since a timestamp

tools.name: tracker_export
tools.description: Export full project as nested JSON

tools.name: artifact_get
tools.description: Get artifact with full context (parents, children, traces)

tools.name: artifact_update
tools.description: Update artifact status, hash, drift detection

tools.name: artifact_coverage
tools.description: Coverage matrix: which ACs are implemented/verified

tools.name: trace_add
tools.description: Add directed trace edge between artifacts/tasks

tools.name: episode_status
tools.description: Read episode stage, task counts, baseline, drift state

tools.name: episode_transition
tools.description: Advance episode stage with hard gate enforcement

tools.name: workflow_generate_next
tools.description: Generate typed downstream tasks from accepted upstream

tools.name: worker_next
tools.description: Atomically claim next task from project queue

tools.name: worker_done
tools.description: Complete held task, move to review/done

tools.name: worker_ask_need
tools.description: Flag task needs-human (blocked on human answer)

tools.name: worker_ask_done
tools.description: Clear needs-human flag after human answered

tools.name: worker_health
tools.description: Check for stuck worktrees (zombies, never-merged, conflicts)

tools.name: repository_list
tools.description: List physical repositories attached to project

tools.name: conflict_keys_set
tools.description: Tag task with semantic conflict keys

tools.name: conflict_keys_clear
tools.description: Remove all conflict keys from task

tools.name: conflict_keys_auto_derive
tools.description: Auto-derive conflict keys from task fields

tools.name: conflict_check
tools.description: Scan episode/repo for semantic collision pairs
